_comment: Hook configuration added to ~/.claude/settings.json for investigation 002/Mechanism B.
_note: Three variants were tested across experiments 06-12. All were reverted after experiments.

variant_1_PreToolUse._result: Did not fire for slash command invocations. Slash commands bypass the Skill tool.

variant_2_UserPromptSubmit_slash_only._result: Worked for slash commands. Natural language not covered.

variant_3_always_on_final._result: Worked for both slash command and natural language. Control (no-step skill) correctly created 0 tasks.
